creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Nick!

What about adding a patch that updates the port and update the MAINTAINER line to this PR?  Then change the PR title to something like "[patch] x11-toolkits/granite: Update to XXX and take maintainership" ;-)

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/book.html#svn-diff

Thanks!
